definition.title: The Modern Day Pony Express (Recurring Content Franchise)
definition.objective: Makes relay network concept memorable and shareable through character-driven storytelling. Pony Express metaphor already embedded in LHS DNA. Character is distinctive, meme-able, and merchandisable.
definition.target_audience: General social audience (entertainment), truck drivers (relay education), LinkedIn professionals (thought leadership), merch buyers (character IP)
definition.cadence: Geoffrey developing through end of February. Next: Episode 1 concept, character design brief.

campaign_card.target_audience: General social audience (entertainment), truck drivers (relay education), LinkedIn professionals (thought leadership), merch buyers (character IP)
campaign_card.campaign_name: The Modern Day Pony Express (Recurring Content Franchise)
key_messages: The original network that moved America — Pony Express to LineHaul Station
Character-driven franchise: shareable, meme-able, and merchandisable
Makes the relay network concept memorable through storytelling, not explanation

initiatives: Social shorts from episodes. LinkedIn thought leadership. Character merch. Boots Walker integration. Meme content. Cross-card connections to

_legacy_card.description: Time-traveling cowboy from the Pony Express era delivers TED Talks about relay networks, appears on modern news channels, and partners with LineHaul Station. Franchise thinking: each episode is standalone shareable, character is merchandisable.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Makes relay network concept memorable and shareable through character-driven storytelling. Pony Express metaphor already embedded in LHS DNA. Character is distinctive, meme-able, and merchandisable.
_legacy_card.asset_links: No produced assets yet — Geoffrey developing concept through end of February.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: The original network that moved America. Every relay station was a LineHaul Station. Time-traveling cowboy TED Talks. News channel appearances. Historical parallel narrative.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: TBD — depends on animation/video production approach. Character design investment upfront.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Social shorts from episodes. LinkedIn thought leadership. Character merch. Boots Walker integration. Meme content. Cross-card connections to Hello America and Master Deck.
_legacy_card.timeline: Geoffrey developing through end of February. Next: Episode 1 concept, character design brief.
